title: 10 health benefits of Dorema ammoniacum (iranian galbanum)
intro: Dorema ammoniacum, also known as Iranian Galbanum, has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. These medicinal properties help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis, asthma, and coughs by reducing inflammation and killing bacteria. For example, a warm infusion made from the plant's leaves can ease congestion and relieve chest pain, improving sleep quality and overall well-being for individuals suffering from chronic respiratory conditions.
